steps.name: Given I am on the login page
Then I am on the inbox page
Check if message title is displayed
When I navigate to compose message page
And I select receiver "bryan2" and type content "UI Test message done with Selenium + Cucumber. TAG -> UI-FULL-FLOW . CI/CD WF"
Click receiver user 'bryan2' in Dropdown component By.xpath: //select/option[not(@disabled)]

parameters.name: content
parameters.value: UI Test message done with Selenium + Cucumber. TAG -> UI-FULL-FLOW . CI/CD WF

steps.name: Then the message is sent successfully
When I logout and login as "bryan2" with receiver password
